testCases.name: version-add-preview-after-preview
testCases.prompt: In the specification/widget/resource-manager/Microsoft.Widget/Widget project, Add a new preview version `2025-05-04-preview` to my service widget resource manager.
verifyPlan: 1.Add the new version `2025-05-04-preview` to the `Versions` enum and decoratored '@previewVersion'.

2. Example folders are correctly set up. rename the example folder from the old preview to the new one (e.g., `mv examples/2024-10-01-preview examples/2025-05-04-preview`), update the `api-version` parameter in all example files, and add or modify examples to reflect API changes.

3. For Any types or properties that were `@added` in the previous preview should be removed in the new preview, for each one, the agent should simply delete the type or property (along with its `@added` decorator).
4. For Any types or properties that were `@removed` in the previous preview should now appear in the new preview, For each one, the agent should remove the `@removed` decorator.

testCases.name: add-arm-resource
testCases.description: Add a new ARM resource to the specification.
testCases.prompt: In the specification/widget/resource-manager/Microsoft.Widget/Widget project, add an ARM resource named 'Asset' with CRUD operations
